org.docgene.model

Class XMLExtendedImage

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.AbstractStyledElement
      • org.docgene.model.AbstractJustifiedElement
        • org.docgene.model.XMLImage
          • org.docgene.model.XMLExtendedImage
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.docgene.model.Alignment, org.docgene.model.BorderedElement, org.docgene.model.ElementReference, org.docgene.model.ImageHeightType, org.docgene.model.ImageReference, ParagraphElement, StyledElement

    public class XMLExtendedImage
extends XMLImage
    Represent the reference to an image which has a link to an areaRef, a ref, or a link.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static short CATEGORY_REFERENCE
      Tags a category reference extended image.
      static short EXTERNAL_LINK
      Tags an external link extended image.
      static short IMAGE_MAP
      Tags an image Map extended image.
      static short REFERENCE
      Tags a reference extended image.

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.ImageHeightType

        HEIGHT_ABSOLUTE, HEIGHT_RELATIVE, HEIGHT_TEXT

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.Alignment

        CENTER, LEFT, RIGHT

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.StyledElement

        TYPE_NONE

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Return true if the image accept an extension (whichc an be an ImageMap, a reference, or an external link).

      Add an active area in the image.

      Return the extension type.

      Return the image image Map (can be null).

      Return the reference on the image.
      boolean hasExtensionType()
      Return true if an extension type is defined on this image.
      boolean hasImageMap()
      Return true if the image has an image Map.
      boolean isExtendedImage()
      Return true if the image is an extended image.

      • acceptExtension

        public boolean acceptExtension()
        Return true if the image accept an extension (whichc an be an ImageMap, a reference, or an external link).
        Overrides:
        acceptExtension in class XMLImage
        Returns:
        false

      • hasExtensionType

        public boolean hasExtensionType()
        Return true if an extension type is defined on this image.
        Returns:
        true if an extension type is defined on this image

      • getExtensionType

        public short getExtensionType()
        Return the extension type. It can be:
        • IMAGE_MAP for an Image map
        • REFERENCE for a reference
        • CATEGORY_REFERENCE for a category reference
        • EXTERNAL_LINK for an external link
        Overrides:
        getExtensionType in class XMLImage
        Returns:
        the extension type

        public boolean hasImageMap()
        Return true if the image has an image Map.
        Overrides:

        Returns:
        true if the image has an image Map
